race.comment: NOTHIN' WONG HERE (8) recorded another minor placing last time out, finishing 0.8 lengths away in second over 2050m at Wodonga when he was prominent throughout. The maiden win looks close and he gets every chance from the draw. CRISTARIA (12) finished fourth two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1600m at Seymour, beaten 4.5 lengths. Rates well on that and should be hard to hold out. SPICY APPLE (10) improved last start but found a couple better over 1894m at Kyneton, beaten 2.75 lengths after being in contention on the turn. Chance on that effort. PATH TO VICTORY (9) has shown some ability in three runs to date and has each way claims.
